splits.title: Notes from the Field
splits.start_boundary: Notes from the Field North Central States
splits.end_boundary: Sister Signe L. Hulterstrom in December, 1931.

files.notes: This is a single article containing reports from multiple missions (North Central States, Northern States, Central States, Texas, California, Arizona, Swiss-German, and Swedish missions). The entire content is one cohesive 'Notes from the Field' article with multiple subsections organized by mission areas.
